name: SkySQL
description: SkySQL — MariaDB's managed cloud database service with Xpand distributed SQL and ColumnStore analytics engine.

seo.title: SkySQL — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: SkySQL: SkySQL — MariaDB's managed cloud database service with Xpand distributed SQL and ColumnStore analytics engine.

when_to_use: Managed MariaDB cloud with Xpand distributed SQL
Columnar analytics on ColumnStore alongside OLTP workloads
Serverless MariaDB with auto-scaling for variable traffic
Enterprise MariaDB managed service with 24/7 DBA support
Multi-cloud MariaDB with cross-region replication options

pros: Managed MariaDB from the source vendor
review.verdict: Solid managed MariaDB with distributed SQL, but Postgres-first trends make it a harder pick now.
review.best_for: MariaDB-centric teams needing managed service with distributed SQL or analytics add-ons
review.not_for: Postgres shops, greenfield projects, or teams chasing the largest managed DB ecosystem
